violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen by the dish area was blocked by a bike. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. The bike was moved during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Raw animal foods (such as shell eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as vegetables and herbs) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Food items were rearranged during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Knives were observed stored between the prep unit and the hot-hold table between uses. Utensils between uses shall be stored in one of the following manners: on a dry clean surface, in water with sufficient velocity to flush particulates to the drain, or in water that is maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or more. Utensils were cleaned and sanitized during the time of inspection and moved to a dry clean surface. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the kitchen prep unit and the service prep unit. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
The condensate from the walk-in cooler refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025
The floor tiles in the kitchen area are cracked or missing and are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2026
Prep unit #2 gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2025

The prep unit #2 gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The walk-in cooler was observed holding an ambient temperature of 49 DF. The walk-in cooler must hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Establishment is to get walk-in cooler serviced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2025

The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible in the ware-washing area. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Establishment is to install a hand-washing sink in the ware-washing area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2025

The following was observed in poor repair -The prep unit lid -Gasket on prep unit #2 -The walk-in cooler was observed not maintaining temperature -Dishwasher was in poor repair not reaching the proper chlorine sanitizer concentration Equipment must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2025
The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors must be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen and basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2025

The wall behind the 3-bay sink and prep sink is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2025
